name: baldr-router-vscode
description: One-click Baldr Console and MCP facade for durable, client-agnostic agent orchestration.

chatParticipants.name: baldr
chatParticipants.description: Optional chat shortcut for durable Baldr work items. The dedicated Baldr Activity Bar view is the primary interface.

commands.name: setup
commands.description: Prepare Baldr and show setup status.

commands.name: status
commands.description: Show compact runtime and durable item status.

commands.name: run
commands.description: Create and start a durable Baldr item.

disambiguation.description: Use Baldr Router when the user explicitly asks to orchestrate architect, implementer, or reviewer agents through Baldr.
examples: Use Baldr to implement this task
Run an architect and implementer workflow

baldr.runtime.mode.description: Runtime discovery mode. Auto prefers the host and uses WSL only when needed.

baldr.runtime.wslDistro.description: Optional WSL distribution override. Leave empty for automatic detection.

baldr.onboarding.openAfterInstall.description: Offer the guided setup the first time the extension activates.

untrustedWorkspaces.description: Baldr executes local providers and modifies repositories only after VS Code Workspace Trust is granted.
